summary: Verified the canvasUpdated variable scoping bug fix. The variable is now correctly declared at line 1196 in the outer function scope of message-stream.js, making it accessible to all references at lines 3443, 3511, and 3541. All tests pass: login flow works, dashboard loads, stream endpoint returns 200, no 'canvasUpdated is not defined' errors in console, and the UI does not get stuck in 'Generating...' state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The canvasUpdated variable scoping bug has been fixed. The variable is now declared at line 1196 in the outer function scope of /app/lib/ai/message-stream.js, ensuring all references at lines 3443, 3511, and 3541 can access it properly.

frontend_login.note: Login with testprov@test.com / password123 works, redirects to dashboard

project_opens.note: Stream Test Project opens correctly, shows conversations and quick actions

chat_stream_works.note: Sent 'Hello, test message' and received AI response without errors

no_generating_stuck_state.note: Stream completed properly, no stuck 'Generating...' state

no_canvasUpdated_errors.note: No 'canvasUpdated is not defined' errors in browser console

locations: Line 1196: let canvasUpdated = false (declaration in outer function scope)
Line 2796: canvasUpdated = true (assignment inside tool handler)
Line 2933: canvasUpdated = true (assignment inside another handler)
Line 3446: canvasUpdated = await this.updateCanvasFromExchange(...) (reference - now in scope)
Line 3511: if (projectId && (generatedFiles.length > 0 || canvasUpdated)) (reference - now in scope)
Line 3541: canvasUpdated (reference in done event data - now in scope)
canvasUpdated_variable_scope.note: Variable moved from line 1306 (inside else block) to line 1196 (outer function scope)

fix_verification.issue: canvasUpdated was declared inside an else block (line 1306) but referenced outside that block at lines 3443, 3511, 3541, causing 'canvasUpdated is not defined' ReferenceError
fix_verification.fix: Moved 'let canvasUpdated = false' declaration to line 1196 in the outer function scope alongside other variables like toolCalls, generatedFiles, diffFiles, etc.
fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - All references to canvasUpdated are now properly in scope
